title: Genevos and SSB Green Enviro Collaborate for Large-Scale Hydrogen Solutions Deployment Across India
content: Genevos, a leading hydrogen fuel cell power systems integrator, has secured a Letter of Intention (LOI) with S.S.B.I. Group of Companies, an innovative Indian developer of turnkey green hydrogen solutions. â€This strategic partnership aims to support the development and deployment of over 50 hydrogen-powered vessels across India within the next decade. The scope of collaboration will span across multiple vessel types from harbour and coastal workboats (pilot vessel, tugboats etc.) to passenger ferries and potentially light cargo vessels, tailored for Indian maritime environments.
author: Analysts Account
